app.description: Tailscale is a zero-config VPN that creates a secure network between your devices using WireGuard.

dialog.title: Tailscale Mode
dialog.message:
Tailscale client will be installed in \Z2host networking\Zn mode.

This means all apps on the Docker host can be accessed using TAILSCALE-IP:PORT (e.g. \Z4http://XXX.XXX.XXX.XXX:3050\Zn for Deployrr Dashboard).

\Z1IMPORTANT!\Zn
Turning off MagicDNS in Tailscale admin console is recommended. Otherwise, loss of internet connectivity on the Docker host can occur.
